not_verified: invariant I4 -- this implementation agent does not verify its own work; /cdr:verify still required.
summary: Added agents/eval/baselines/vector_rag.py: a genuinely tuned classic vector-RAG baseline (fixed-size word-boundary-snapped chunker whose size/overlap defaults come from a real grid-search sweep against a fixture corpus/query set, plus a local OllamaEmbeddingClient (nomic-embed-text via /api/embed) and cosine-similarity VectorRagIndex/retrieve_documents doing genuine embedding-based retrieval with document-level aggregation). Added agents/eval/baselines/__init__.py and agents/eval/test_vector_rag_baseline.py (12 tests: pure-unit chunker/recall-metric tests + live recall/tuning-sweep tests against the real local embedding model, skip-if-unreachable mirroring test_e2e_smoke.py's convention).

local_only_confirmation.provider_used: ollama (local, http://localhost:11434), model nomic-embed-text for embeddings
local_only_confirmation.new_local_model_pulled: nomic-embed-text (274MB, via `ollama pull nomic-embed-text` in this session)

test_results.target_test: cd agents && python -m pytest eval/test_vector_rag_baseline.py -v -> 12 passed in 6.85s, live tests genuinely exercised real (non-mocked) local embeddings
test_results.whole_repo_regression: cd agents && python -m pytest -q -> 386 passed, 5 warnings in 227.34s (zero regressions; includes the live test_e2e_smoke.py::test_full_pipeline_smoke)

benchmark_fairness_disclosure.chunker: fixed-size, word-boundary-snapped, sliding-window with overlap -- the standard production vector-RAG chunking strategy, not a degenerate strawman variant
benchmark_fairness_disclosure.chunk_config_tuning: DEFAULT_CHUNK_SIZE_WORDS=80, DEFAULT_OVERLAP_WORDS=0 -- the winning output of select_chunk_config's real grid-search sweep (9 candidates: chunk sizes {80,150,220} x overlap fractions {0%,15%,30%}) run against the fixture corpus/query set using the real embedding/retrieval path; full per-candidate recall table recorded in self-consistency.json
benchmark_fairness_disclosure.embedding_model: nomic-embed-text -- a real, dedicated, open-weight 768-dim text-embedding model run locally via Ollama, not a hashing trick or TF-IDF mislabeled as an embedding
benchmark_fairness_disclosure.retrieval: genuine cosine-similarity vector search over those embeddings, not a keyword/BM25 stand-in
benchmark_fairness_disclosure.disclosed_limitation: the fixture corpus is small (5 docs, 5 queries) and most tuning-grid candidates tied at perfect recall@3 on it (only one candidate, (220,33) overlap, showed a measurable recall drop to 0.9) -- a genuinely discriminating tuning sweep needs a larger/harder corpus than a fixture can practically provide; a future real-corpus-scale benchmark subtask is expected to re-run select_chunk_config against the real combined corpus for a sharper-discriminating result. This is disclosed, not hidden, in architecture-discovery.md and self-consistency.json.
benchmark_fairness_disclosure.scope_not_addressed_by_this_subtask: no reranking step (LLD treats it as optional, not required); no run against the real synthetic-PDF/Bitext/Enron corpora (explicitly out of scope per launching-agent instruction, reserved for a future subtask)

next_steps: Await /cdr:verify. Remaining Phase 5 subtasks under issue #27 (5.2.2-5.2.4 per the milestone) and issue #26/#27's own summary bookkeeping are not addressed by this run.
